4   The sequence xn is given by:

                                    x1 = 10

                                            √
                                   xn+1 =       xn for n ≥ 1


    What is the value of x100 ?
                    c       c
    [Note that ab means a(b ) ]

            99
    A 102
            100

    C 102
            −100
    D 102
             99

                                            6

stem.rawText:
The sequence xn is given by:

                                    x1 = 10

                                            √
                                   xn+1 =       xn for n ≥ 1


    What is the value of x100 ?
                    c       c
    [Note that ab means a(b ) ]

            99

solution.rawText:
We work out the first few terms, writing them in the form of the given options:



                         x1 = 10
                              √       1       −1
                         x2 = 10 = 10 2 = 102
                                           −1  1
                              p                        −1 1      −2
                         x3 = 102−1 = 102       2
                                                  = 102 × 2 = 102
                                                         −99
As this pattern continues, we will end up with x100 = 102      , which is option C.




c UCLES                                                                               Page 6
